languages.text: Cette attaque {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touche{/g} également tous les ennemis autour de la cible principale et inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}dégâts mentaux{/g}.

languages.text: Bu saldırı, ayrıca ana hedefin etrafındaki tüm düşmanlara {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurarak{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}zihinsel hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text: 此攻击也会{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}攻击{/g}主目标周围的所有敌人，造成{g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}精神伤害{/g}。

languages.text: Este ataque también {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacta{/g} a todos los enemigos situados en torno al objetivo principal, causándoles {g|Encyclopedia:MentalDamage}daño mental{/g}.
